You assist users with a wide range of tasks including answering questions, writing and editing code, analyzing information, creative work, and executing actions via your tools. You communicate clearly, admit uncertainty when appropriate, and prioritize being genuinely useful over being verbose unless otherwise directed below. Be targeted and efficient in your exploration and investigations.

If the user asks about configuring, setting up, or using Hermes Agent itself, load the `hermes-agent` skill with skill_view(name='hermes-agent') before answering. Docs: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs

User home directory: /root
Current working directory: /root/.hermes/hermes-agent

You are a CLI AI Agent. Try not to use markdown but simple text renderable inside a terminal. File delivery: there is no attachment channel — the user reads your response directly in their terminal. Do NOT emit MEDIA:/path tags (those are only intercepted on messaging platforms like Telegram, Discord, Slack, etc.; on the CLI they render as literal text). When referring to a file you created or changed, just state its absolute path in plain text; the user can open it from there.

function.name: patch
function.description:
Targeted find-and-replace edits in files. Use this instead of sed/awk in terminal. Uses fuzzy matching (9 strategies) so minor whitespace/indentation differences won't break it. Returns a unified diff. Auto-runs syntax checks after editing.

REPLACE MODE (mode='replace', default): find a unique string and replace it. REQUIRED PARAMETERS: mode, path, old_string, new_string.
PATCH MODE (mode='patch'): apply V4A multi-file patches for bulk changes. REQUIRED PARAMETERS: mode, patch.

mode.description: Edit mode. 'replace' (default): requires path + old_string + new_string. 'patch': requires patch content only.

path.description: REQUIRED when mode='replace'. File path to edit.

old_string.description: REQUIRED when mode='replace'. Exact text to find and replace. Must be unique in the file unless replace_all=true. Include surrounding context lines to ensure uniqueness.

new_string.description: REQUIRED when mode='replace'. Replacement text. Pass empty string '' to delete the matched text.

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences instead of requiring a unique match (default: false)

patch.description:
REQUIRED when mode='patch'. V4A format patch content. Format:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: path/to/file
@@ context hint @@
 context line
-removed line
+added line
*** End Patch

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a text file with line numbers and pagination. Use this instead of cat/head/tail in terminal. Output format: 'LINE_NUM|CONTENT'. Suggests similar filenames if not found. Use offset and limit for large files. Reads exceeding ~100K characters are rejected; use offset and limit to read specific sections of large files. NOTE: Cannot read images or binary files — use vision_analyze for images.

path.description: Path to the file to read (absolute, relative, or ~/path)

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed, default: 1)

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read (default: 500, max: 2000)

function.name: search_files
function.description:
Search file contents or find files by name. Use this instead of grep/rg/find/ls in terminal. Ripgrep-backed, faster than shell equivalents.

Content search (target='content'): Regex search inside files. Output modes: full matches with line numbers, file paths only, or match counts.

File search (target='files'): Find files by glob pattern (e.g., '*.py', '*config*'). Also use this instead of ls — results sorted by modification time.

pattern.description: Regex pattern for content search, or glob pattern (e.g., '*.py') for file search

target.description: 'content' searches inside file contents, 'files' searches for files by name

path.description: Directory or file to search in (default: current working directory)

file_glob.description: Filter files by pattern in grep mode (e.g., '*.py' to only search Python files)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

offset.description: Skip first N results for pagination (default: 0)

output_mode.description: Output format for grep mode: 'content' shows matching lines with line numbers, 'files_only' lists file paths, 'count' shows match counts per file

context.description: Number of context lines before and after each match (grep mode only)

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write content to a file, completely replacing existing content. Use this instead of echo/cat heredoc in terminal. Creates parent directories automatically. OVERWRITES the entire file — use 'patch' for targeted edits. Auto-runs syntax checks on .py/.json/.yaml/.toml and other linted languages; only NEW errors introduced by this write are surfaced (pre-existing errors are filtered out).

path.description: Path to the file to write (will be created if it doesn't exist, overwritten if it does)

content.description: Complete content to write to the file

messages.content: Create all remaining section components (Gallery, Sourcing, Team, Testimonials, FAQ, Contact, Footer, WhatsAppFloat).
Let me start by examining the existing project structure and content files.

{"content": " 1|'use client' 2| 3|import { useState, useMemo } from 'react' 4|import { Calculator as CalculatorIcon, TrendingDown, Clock, Percent } from 'lucide-react' 5|import content from '@/content/es.json' 6| 7|interface FieldConfig { 8| label: string 9| default: number 10|} 11| 12|const fields: Record = content.home.calculator.fields 13|const { positiveCopy, negativeCopy, cta } = content.home.calculator 14| 15|function formatGs(value: number): string { 16| return new Intl.NumberFormat('es-PY').format(Math.round(value)) 17|} 18| 19|function formatGsInput(value: number): string { 20| // Remove decimals, format with thousand separators 21| return new Intl.NumberFormat('es-PY', { maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(value) 22|} 23| 24|function parseGsInput(raw: string): number { 25| // Remove any non-digit characters except comma/dot 26| const cleaned = raw.replace(/[^\d,.]/g, '').replace(/,/g, '') 27| const num = Number(cleaned) 28| return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num 29|} 30| 31|type InputKey = 'gastoSuper' | 'gastoDelivery' | 'comidaTirada' | 'gasLuz' | 'personas' | 'valorHora' | 'horasCocina' 32| 33|export default function Calculator() { 34| const initialValues: Record = { 35| gastoSuper: fields.gastoSuper.default, 36| gastoDelivery: fields.gastoDelivery.default, 37| comidaTirada: fields.comidaTirada.default, 38| gasLuz: fields.gasLuz.default, 39| personas: fields.personas.default, 40| valorHora: fields.valorHora.default, 41| horasCocina: fields.horasCocina.default, 42| } 43| 44| const [values, setValues] = useState>(() => { 45| const initial: Record = {} 46| for (const key of Object.keys(initialValues) as InputKey[]) { 47| initial[key] = formatGsInput(initialValues[key]) 48| } 49| return initial as Record 50| }) 51| 52| const handleChange = (key: InputKey, raw: string) => { 53| setValues((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: raw })) 54| } 55| 56| const handleBlur = (key: InputKey) => { 57| setValues((prev) => { 58| const num = parseGsInput(prev[key]) 59| return { ...prev, [key]: formatGsInput(num) } 60| }) 61| } 62| 63| const nums = useMemo(() => { 64| const parsed: Record = {} 65| for (const key of Object.keys(values) as InputKey[]) { 66| parsed[key] = parseGsInput(values[key]) 67| } 68| return parsed as Record 69| }, [values]) 70| 71| // Calculations 72| const totalGasto = nums.gastoSuper + nums.gastoDelivery + nums.comidaTirada + nums.gasLuz 73| const valorTiempo = nums.valorHora * nums.horasCocina 74| const costoTotalReal = totalGasto + valorTiempo 75| 76| let precioServicio = 0 77| if (nums.personas <= 1) { 78| precioServicio = 400000 79| } else if (nums.personas === 2) { 80| precioServicio = 650000 81| } else { 82| precioServicio = 900000 83| } 84| 85| const ahorro = costoTotalReal - precioServicio 86| const horasRecuperadas = nums.horasCocina 87| const isPositive = ahorro > 0 88| 89| // WhatsApp text 90| const waText = useMemo(() => { 91| const lines = [ 92| 'Hola! Quiero pedir mi propuesta personalizada 🙌', 93| '', 94| '📊 *Mis números de la calculadora:*', 95| `• Gasto supermercado: Gs. ${formatGs(nums.gastoSuper)}/sem`, 96| `• Delivery / afuera: Gs. ${formatGs(nums.gastoDelivery)}/sem`, 97| `• Comida tirada: Gs. ${formatGs(nums.comidaTirada)}/sem`, 98| `• Gas/luz/agua: Gs. ${formatGs(nums.gasLuz)}/sem`, 99| `• Personas en hogar: ${nums.personas}`, 100| `• Valor hora libre: Gs. ${formatGs(nums.valorHora)}`, 101| `• Horas cocina/sem: ${nums.horasCocina}`, 102| '', 103| `💰 *Resultado:* Gasto total real: Gs. ${formatGs(costoTotalReal)}/sem`, 104| ` Precio servicio: Gs. ${formatGs(precioServicio)}/sem`, 105| isPositive 106| ? ` ✅ Ahorro estimado: Gs. ${formatGs(ahorro)}/sem` 107| : ` ℹ️ Costo comparable`, 108| ] 109| return encodeURIComponent(lines.join('\n')) 110| }, [nums, costoTotalReal, precioServicio, ahorro, isPositive]) 111| 112| const waHref = `https://wa.me/595981324569?text=${waText}` 113| 114| return ( 115|
116|
117| {/* Section header */} 118|
119|

120| {content.home.calculator.title} 121|

122|

123| {content.home.calculator.subtitle} 124|

125|
126| 127|
128| {/* Form inputs */} 129|
130| {/* Gasto supermercado */} 131|
132| 135|
136| 137| Gs. 138| 139| handleChange('gastoSuper', e.target.value)} 144| onBlur={() => handleBlur('gastoSuper')} 145| className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 146| /> 147|
148|
149| 150| {/* Delivery / comer afuera */} 151|
152| 155|
156| 157| Gs. 158| 159| handleChange('gastoDelivery', e.target.value)} 164| onBlur={() => handleBlur('gastoDelivery')} 165| className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 166| /> 167|

176| 177| Gs. 178| 179| handleChange('comidaTirada', e.target.value)} 184| onBlur={() => handleBlur('comidaTirada')} 185| className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 186| /> 187|
188|
189| 190| {/* Gas + luz + agua cocina */} 191|
192| 195|
196| 197| Gs. 198| 199| handleChange('gasLuz', e.target.value)} 204| onBlur={() => handleBlur('gasLuz')} 205| className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 206| /> 207|
208|
209| 210| {/* Personas en hogar */} 211|
212| 215| { 221| const v = e.target.value 222| if (v === '' || /^\d+$/.test(v)) { 223| handleChange('personas', v || '0') 224| } 225| }} 226| className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 227| /> 228|
229| 230| {/* Valor hora libre */} 231|
232| 235|
236| 237| Gs. 238| 239| handleChange('valorHora', e.target.value)} 244| onBlur={() => handleBlur('valorHora')} 245| className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 246| /> 247|
248|
249| 250| {/* Horas/semana comprando+cocinando */} 251|
252| 255| { 262| const v = e.target.value 263| if (v === '' || /^\d*\.?\d*$/.test(v)) { 264| handleChange('horasCocina', v || '0') 265| } 266| }} 267| className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-crema-dark)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] text-[var(--color-text)] font-[var(--font-body)] text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--color-mercado)]/30 focus:border-[var(--color-mercado)] transition-colors" 268| /> 269|
270|
271| 272| {/* Results panel */} 273|

messages.content:
{"content": "     1|import type { Metadata } from 'next'
     2|import { Inter, Fraunces } from 'next/font/google'
     3|import './globals.css'
     4|
     5|const inter = Inter({
     6|  subsets: ['latin'],
     7|  display: 'swap',
     8|  variable: '--font-body',
     9|})
    10|
    11|const fraunces = Fraunces({
    12|  subsets: ['latin'],
    13|  weight: ['600', '700'],
    14|  display: 'swap',
    15|  variable: '--font-heading',
    16|})
    17|
    18|const BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL || 'https://paragu-ai.com/s/es/de-abasto-a-casa'
    19|
    20|export const metadata: Metadata = {
    21|  metadataBase: new URL(BASE),
    22|  title: 'De Abasto a Casa — Mercado, prep y comidas listas. Puerta a puerta, en San Lorenzo.',
    23|  description: 'Convertimos el caos del mercado en comida lista. Compras, mise-en-place y freezer meals. San Lorenzo, Paraguay.',
    24|  openGraph: {
    25|    title: 'De Abasto a Casa',
    26|    description: 'Mercado, prep y comidas listas. Puerta a puerta.',
    27|    url: BASE,
    28|    siteName: 'De Abasto a Casa',
    29|    locale: 'es_PY',
    30|    type: 'website',
    31|  },
    32|  icons: {
    33|    icon: '/images/brand/favicon.png',
    34|    apple: '/images/brand/apple-touch-icon.png',
    35|  },
    36|}
    37|
    38|export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
    39|  return (
    40|    <html lang="es" className={`${inter.variable} ${fraunces.variable} scroll-smooth`}>
    41|      <body className="min-h-screen bg-surface text-text font-sans">{children}</body>
    42|    </html>
    43|  )
    44|}
    45|", "total_lines": 44, "file_size": 1329, "truncated": false, "is_binary": false, "is_image": false}

All files are created and valid. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:

---

## Summary

**Created 8 section component files** at `/root/de-abasto-a-casa/src/components/sections/`:

### 1. `Gallery.tsx` (71 lines)
- **Server component** importing from `content/home/gallery`
- 3×3 masonry-style grid with gradient SVG placeholder boxes (green/terracotta)
- 4 categories cycle across 9 cells: Cortes de Carne, Mise en Place, Freezer Meals, Mercado
- Each cell has an `Image` icon from lucide, category label, and hover scale effect
- `id="galeria"`

### 2. `Sourcing.tsx` (71 lines)
- **Server component** importing from `content/home/sourcing`
- 2×2 grid (1 col mobile, 2 col desktop) with 4 pillar cards
- Icons mapped: Beef → `Beef`, Warehouse → `Warehouse`, Calendar → `Calendar`, ShieldCheck → `ShieldCheck`
- Clean card design with icon in mercado-green circle

### 3. `Team.tsx` (63 lines)
- **Server component** importing from `content/home/team`
- Single card for Iván Weiss van der Pol with `User` icon placeholder, name, role, bio

### 4. `Testimonials.tsx` (68 lines)
- **Server component** importing from `content/home/testimonials`
- 3 cards in responsive grid (1 col mobile, 3 col desktop)
- Decorative quote mark, author + role below, illustrative note

### 5. `FAQ.tsx` (76 lines) — `'use client'`
- Accordion with `useState`/`useCallback` for open-close interaction
- `ChevronDown` rotates 180° on open
- Single-open-only pattern, `id="faq"`

### 6. `Contact.tsx` (90 lines)
- **Server component** - importing from `home/contact` and `home/cta`
- Split layout: CTA banner (left) + contact details (right)
- Background: mercado green style
- WhatsApp, Email, MapPin, Clock icons from lucide

### 7. `Footer.tsx` (59 lines)
- **Server component** importing from `footer`
- Dark background (var(--color-text)), Fraunces business name, nav links, copyright
- Clean centered layout

### 8. `WhatsAppFloat.tsx` (22 lines) — `'use client'`
- Fixed bottom-right floating button with `MessageCircle` icon
- Links to `wa.me` with pre-filled message from content
- `animate-pulse` pulse animation, `z-50`

**All files:**
- Import content from `@/content/es.json` via the `@/*` path alias
- Use Tailwind v4 theme tokens (`var(--color-mercado)`, `var(--color-terracota)`, etc.)
- Use appropriate `lucide-react` icons
- Follow the same patterns as existing components (Hero, Services, HowItWorks, Calculator)
